quote_intro: Tell us about your vehicle and what you want to build. We’ll follow up with recommendations and next steps.
subheadline: Custom off-road builds, suspension upgrades, lighting, armor, recovery gear, and adventure-ready vehicles built for Northern California.
headline: Northern California Adventure Builds

reviews.name: Customer Name
reviews.text: JT Offroad transformed my truck exactly how I wanted it. Clean work, clear communication, and a solid setup.

reviews.name: Customer Name
reviews.text: Professional install, fair recommendations, and attention to detail. Highly recommend.

services.title: Suspension & Lift Kits
services.description: Lift kits, leveling kits, shocks, coilovers, leaf packs, upper control arms, and complete suspension systems.

services.title: Wheels & Tires
services.description: Wheel packages, tire upgrades, fitment guidance, and off-road-ready setups.

services.title: Armor & Protection
services.description: Bumpers, skid plates, rock sliders, bed protection, and underbody armor.

services.title: Lighting & Electrical
services.description: Light bars, ditch lights, auxiliary lighting, switch panels, battery systems, and clean wiring.

services.title: Recovery Equipment
services.description: Winches, recovery points, onboard air systems, and trail recovery setups.

services.title: Overland Builds
services.description: Roof racks, bed racks, storage, camping systems, and full adventure build planning.

about_text: JT Offroad builds practical, reliable, and trail-ready vehicles for people who want more than stock. From suspension upgrades to complete adventure builds, every setup is built around how the vehicle will actually be used.

merch.name: Built Beyond Hoodie
merch.description: Premium hoodie with JT Offroad branding.

merch.name: JT Offroad Decal
merch.description: Vinyl decal for windows, toolboxes, and rigs.
